global_brief: 过去24小时的重要动态主要集中在：秘密会议、高管出局、押注谷歌Gemini——新Siri能否救赎库克的最后一战？；From "Weak" Signals to Strong Models: Preference Delta Aggregation with LoRA Merging；Fine-Tuning and Serving Gemma 4 31B on Google Cloud TPU: A Technical Comparison with GPU Baselines。
